description: Creates a new RFI in a specified Project.

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

assignee_id.description:
The ID of the Assignee User.
*Only admin users can set this field
DEPRECATED. Please use assignee_ids instead

assignee_ids.description:
An array of IDs of the Assignees of the RFI
*Only admin users can set this field
**If this param is not provided, the assigned_id will be used instead

required_assignee_ids.description: An array of IDs of the Assignees that are required to respond to the RFI * Only admin users can set this field ** IDs must also be present in assignee_ids

draft.description: The Draft status of the RFI

due_date.description:
The Due Date of the RFI
*Only admin users can set this field

received_from_login_information_id.description: The ID of the Received From User of the RFI

responsible_contractor_id.description: The ID of the Responsible Contractor Vendor of the RFI

distribution_ids.description: An array of IDs of the Distributions of the RFI

number.description:
The Number of the RFI
*This field will be auto-populated if the RFI is not draft
**When creating a new revision of an RFI, if not provided, it will inherit the number from the source RFI.

private.description: The Private status of the RFI

project_stage_id.description:
The ID of the Project Stage of the RFI
*If Number By Stage is enabled in RFI settings, this will add the prefix of the project stage to the full number of the RFI.
**This field is not needed when c...

schedule_impact.description: The Schedule Impact of the RFI

status.description: The Status of the Schedule Impact

value.description: The Value in days of the Schedule Impact

cost_impact.description: The Cost Impact of the RFI

status.description: The Status of the Cost Impact

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the RFI

drawing_number.description: The Drawing Number of the RFI

specification_section_id.description: The ID of the Specification Section of the RFI

cost_code_id.description: The ID of the Cost Code of the RFI

rfi_manager_id.description:
The ID of the RFI Manager User of the RFI
*Only admin users (or standard users, if the project's configuration allows for it) can set this field

revision.description:
Revision Number
*This field is required only when creating a new revision of an RFI.

source_rfi_header_id.description:
The ID of The Root RFI Revision
*This field is required only when creating a new revision of an RFI.

attachments.description:
RFI's Attachments.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` as files.

prostore_file_ids.description: An array of Prostore File IDs. The Prostore Files will be associated with the RFI as attachments.

drawing_revision_ids.description: Drawing Revisions to attach to the response

file_version_ids.description: File Versions to attach to the response

form_ids.description: Forms to attach to the response

image_ids.description: Images to attach to the response

upload_ids.description: Uploads to attach to the response

document_management_document_revision_id.description: Document Management Document Revisions to attach to the response

custom_textfield_1.description: The Custom Textfield 1 of the RFI

custom_textfield_2.description: The Custom Textfield 2 of the RFI

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...
